name: vibeconf-app
description: AI agents as real participants in your video calls — the open-source desktop client (Electron + MCP).

scripts.test:slack:ci: SLACK_TEST_URL=${SLACK_TEST_URL:-https://app.slack.com/client/T0BCX7N0RA6/C0BCZ4E3Q49}; VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --slack --slack-url=$SLACK_TEST_URL && node scripts/slack-test.mjs --bots Alice:7901,Jimmy:7902 --slack-url=$SLACK_TEST_URL; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --slack --kill; exit $code
scripts.test:meet:ci: VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 && node scripts/meet-test.mjs --bots Alice:7901,Jimmy:7902; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --kill; exit $code
scripts.test:codex:ci: VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 1 && node scripts/smoke-codex-mcp.mjs --base-url=http://127.0.0.1:7901; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 1 --kill; exit $code
scripts.test:meet:ci:workspace: VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --google && node scripts/meet-test.mjs --target workspace --bots Alice:7901,Jimmy:7902; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --google --kill; exit $code
scripts.test:meet:dmg: VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --dmg && node scripts/meet-test.mjs --bots Alice:7901,Jimmy:7902; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --kill; exit $code
scripts.test:meet:built: VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --built && node scripts/meet-test.mjs --bots Alice:7901,Jimmy:7902; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --kill; exit $code
scripts.test:screenshot:ci: VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 1 && node scripts/screenshot-test.mjs --bots Alice:7901; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 1 --kill; exit $code
scripts.test:share-verify:ci: VIBECONF_NO_RUN_TAG=1 scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 && node scripts/share-verify-test.mjs --bots Alice:7901,Jimmy:7902; code=$?; scripts/spawn-test-fleet.sh 2 --kill; exit $code
